assertionResults.fullName: chargeableWeight returns null when all piece weights are zero
assertionResults.title: returns null when all piece weights are zero

assertionResults.fullName: chargeableWeight uses actual weight when no dimensions exist
assertionResults.title: uses actual weight when no dimensions exist

assertionResults.fullName: chargeableWeight uses volumetric when larger than actual
assertionResults.title: uses volumetric when larger than actual

assertionResults.fullName: chargeableWeight uses max(totalActual, totalVolumetric) across pieces
assertionResults.title: uses max(totalActual, totalVolumetric) across pieces
